overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy action RPG showing a hunter character exploring a foggy Victorian Gothic town at night. The character walks along wet cobblestone streets illuminated by warm gas lamps, passing old brick townhouses and approaching a large Gothic manor through the misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy Victorian residential street with gas lamps

events.description: vintage automobiles become visible through the fog ahead on the street

agents.ego_description: character in long coat walks steadily down the wet cobblestone street toward an intersection with a bare tree

entered.detail: tall brick building with lit windows and Gothic architectural details
wet reflective cobblestone pavement stretching into the fog
cast iron street lamp emitting warm orange light
leafless tree silhouetted against the fog at the intersection ahead
old-fashioned automobiles parked along the distant street

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow foggy street lined with Victorian townhouses on the left. Gas lamps cast warm pools of light on the wet cobblestones as the character approaches a bare tree at the intersection ahead, with vintage cars visible through the mist in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching Gothic manor with construction barriers

events.description: character turns right at the intersection toward the large Gothic manor
passing stone wall and yellow-black construction barriers on the right side

agents.ego_description: character pivots right at the intersection and approaches the imposing Gothic manor with multiple chimneys and illuminated windows

entered.detail: imposing multi-story stone building with multiple chimneys and glowing windows
low stone wall running along the right side of the path
yellow and black striped barriers blocking off a section on the right

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at the intersection, passing the bare tree on the left, and approaches a large Gothic manor ahead. Stone walls and construction barriers line the right side of the path as the character moves closer to the building's grand entrance, with the fog partially obscuring the upper floors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, misty street that gradually opens up to reveal a looming Gothic manor. It begins with the character walking past Victorian townhouses, where warm gas lamps cast glowing pools of light across wet cobblestones and vintage cars fade into the distance. As the character reaches an intersection, the camera pivots right past a skeletal, bare tree, shifting the perspective toward a grand architectural focal point. The scene then expands as the character moves along a path lined with stone walls and construction barriers, drawing closer to the manor's entrance. Finally, the camera advances toward the building's imposing facade, with the thick fog partially obscuring the upper floors of the estate.
